game.pacman.description: Control Pac-Man to move through the maze, eat all the dots, and avoid the roaming ghosts.
game.pacman.details:
f%Clear the map of {tc:yellow}normal dots{tc:clear} and {tc:#ff7f27}power pellets{tc:clear}, aiming for a high score before running out of lives.

{tc:yellow}Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:yellow}@{tc:clear} Pac-Man, player controlled, has three lives.
{tc:yellow}·{tc:clear} Normal dot 10 pts
{tc:#ff7f27}*{tc:clear} Power pellet, triggers frightened mode 50 pts
{tc:rgb(255,0,0)}&{tc:clear} Blinky: Directly chases.
{tc:rgb(255,105,180)}&{tc:clear} Pinky: Predicts player's movement.
{tc:rgb(0,255,255)}&{tc:clear} Inky: Teams up with other ghosts to chase.
{tc:rgb(255,165,0)}&{tc:clear} Clyde: Chases from afar, retreats when close.

{tc:yellow}Collectibles (max 1 per level):{tc:clear}
{tc:magenta}%{tc:clear} Cherry 100 pts
{tc:magenta}U{tc:clear} Strawberry 300 pts
{tc:magenta}O{tc:clear} Orange 500 pts
{tc:magenta}Q{tc:clear} Apple 700 pts
{tc:magenta}§{tc:clear} Grapes 1000 pts
{tc:magenta}W{tc:clear} Galaxian 2000 pts
{tc:magenta}?{tc:clear} Bell 3000 pts
{tc:magenta}!{tc:clear} Key 5000 pts

{tc:yellow}Game Mechanics:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Chase Mode{tc:clear} Ghosts pursue according to their strategy.
{tc:light_cyan}Scatter Mode{tc:clear} Ghosts temporarily stop chasing, giving the player a breather.
{tc:light_cyan}Frightened Mode{tc:clear} Triggered by eating a power pellet, allows eating ghosts for higher scores (200 pts / 400 pts / 800 pts / 1600 pts).
{tc:light_cyan}Eaten/Respawning Mode{tc:clear} Eaten ghosts return to the ghost house, waiting to re-enter the maze.
{tc:light_cyan}Level Progression{tc:clear} Difficulty increases with level; ghost strategies are enhanced.
{tc:light_cyan}Extra Life{tc:clear} Player earns one extra life upon reaching 100,000 points, and only once.

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.pacman.name: Pac-Man
warning.back_to_game_list_hint: Press ESC / Q to return to the game list
warning.enlarge_hint: Please enlarge the terminal window to continue.
